title: chloris roxburghii
intro: Chloris roxburghii, also known as the Swertia chirata or Kirata, is a medicinal plant belonging to the gentian family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Chloris roxburghii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Chloris roxburghii is often used in the form of extracts, capsules, or tea, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine to treat various health conditions.
